title: Q&A Forum
tagline: Full-stack discussion platform with CI/CD from day one
description: A production-ready Q&A forum built with Golang, PostgreSQL, and React. Designed for scalability with a focus on clean API design and a smooth developer experience.

caseStudy.problem: Needed a real-world project that demonstrated end-to-end engineering — from API design through deployment — not just a CRUD app.
caseStudy.solution: Built a full Q&A platform with Golang REST API, PostgreSQL relational schema, React frontend, and automated CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions and Docker.

challenges.title: Concurrent vote updates
challenges.how: Used PostgreSQL row-level locking with UPDATE ... RETURNING to safely handle concurrent upvotes without race conditions

challenges.title: Frontend-backend decoupling
challenges.how: Designed a versioned REST API (v1) from the start, allowing independent frontend deployment

architecture: Docker Compose for local dev parity
GitHub Actions: test → build → push image → deploy
scalingDecisions: Connection pooling via pgx for efficient DB connections under load
Stateless API design — horizontally scalable behind a load balancer
Docker multi-stage build keeps image under 20MB
futureImprovements: Add Redis L2 cache for hot questions
Full-text search with pgvector or Elasticsearch
caseStudy.impact: Demonstrates ability to own the full engineering lifecycle: design, implement, test, containerise, and deploy.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A modern personal portfolio website showcasing projects, case studies, and engineering depth. Built with a focus on clean UI, responsive design, and fast load performance.

caseStudy.problem: Needed a portfolio that not only displays projects but clearly communicates engineering thinking, system design skills, and attention to UI/UX.
caseStudy.solution: Built a clean, component-driven React application with structured project case studies, consistent design system, and optimized layout for readability and performance.

challenges.title: UI alignment and spacing consistency
challenges.how: Implemented a consistent layout system using Tailwind (max-width containers, spacing scale, and grid/flex patterns) to ensure visual balance

challenges.title: Content structuring
challenges.how: Designed reusable data-driven components to render projects dynamically from JSON, enabling easy scalability and updates

architecture: Data-driven UI rendering via structured JSON
Tailwind CSS for design system consistency
scalingDecisions: Reusable components for sections and project cards
Optimized asset loading and minimal dependencies
futureImprovements: Add blog section for technical writing
Introduce animations for better user engagement
SSR/SSG using Next.js for improved SEO
caseStudy.impact: Effectively communicates both frontend craftsmanship and backend/system design depth in a single cohesive interface.

title: Go API Gateway
tagline: High-performance gateway with adaptive load balancing
description: A high-performance API Gateway built in Golang featuring custom routing, distributed resilience patterns, and intelligent load balancing under high concurrency.

caseStudy.problem: Needed to design a scalable and resilient gateway capable of handling high request throughput while maintaining low latency and fault tolerance.
caseStudy.solution: Built a custom API Gateway using goroutines and channels with a Radix-Trie router, integrated rate limiting, authentication, circuit breakers, and adaptive load balancing.

challenges.title: High concurrency handling
challenges.how: Leveraged goroutines and channels to efficiently process concurrent requests while maintaining sub-50ms latency under stress

challenges.title: Fault tolerance under failures
challenges.how: Implemented circuit breakers, exponential backoff retries, and health-based routing to prevent cascading failures

architecture: Radix-Trie based routing for efficient path matching
scalingDecisions: Sliding window rate limiter using Redis + Lua for atomic operations
Stateless gateway design for horizontal scaling
Adaptive load balancing inspired by Multi-Armed Bandit algorithms
caseStudy.impact: Demonstrates strong backend engineering skills in concurrency, distributed systems, and real-world resilience patterns.
